Real Customer Reviews (Total: 10):
[1] Careful if you get Mona! I specifically asked her not to use a razor for my hair, show her a picture of what I'd like, she acknowledged it, and then proceeded to do whatever she wanted. Only go here if you want someone else to decide what your hair is going to look like. I even mentioned it again while she was doing it and she ignored me.
[2] I am currently the manager of this salon and hopefully I will be moved to area manager soon. We finally got rid of people that did not belong here that was bringing down the culture and moral of the shop. No more messy gossiping stylist and no more criminals. I feel sorry for the ones that did not make it. Since they clam that they have all this experience, there should be no reason for them to find another job.  But now we can move on and build our store without any distractions. My position has been threatened enough, and I am not going to let a want to be take over what I have built. The stylist here now are wonderful, and they are extremely professional. Moving forward please do not request any stylist. We have your notes on the computer and I have confident that any one of my stylist can provide an excellent service
[3] Excellent atmosphere. One of the stylist named Luis transformed three ladies styles from plain to fabulous in the short time was waiting. So I then decided to get my hair done as well❣️Today I walked in and my hairstylist was unavailable so I tried a new lady named Mona. She was super fun and gave me an excellent hairstyle with instructions for the aftercare ( which in the past, turned out to be a nightmare) and an easy timeless style. You rock Mona
[4] Stay far far away from this location. While I understand that going to these chain salons, you really can't expect to walk out with great results, as anyone with any sort of talent ends up leaving for private owned establishments, however even with tempered expectations, I walked out wondering how this stylist ever received a license to cut hair.The entire time she didn't ask me once about what I wanted, and instead she went on to say everyone cuts like this so that's what she did.This was the older lady with what seemed like an Eastern European accent. Stay far far away from this store, there's a reason why this particular great clips never has a wait time to check in online, while the other locations nearby are constantly filled.
[5] This place is ok. It honestly really depends on who cuts your hair. I had to fix my daughter's haircut and my haircut after getting sloppy uneven haircuts. I was horrified that the lady gave my daughter a bowl cut! Mine was ok, I just had to fix the sides myself because she cut the back fine but the sides were uneven. I shouldn't have to do this after paying full price for haircuts.
[6] I’ve been looking for a new stylist for my hair and I’m so happy I found this place that I’ve been getting my haircut by Carmelle. She’s awesome and really knows how to professionally cut and style my hair. When you look great you feel great. It’s simple science...💇🏼
[7] Bret was amazing and did a wonderful job with my haircut. It was a risky haircut, definitely out of the comfort zone (for me, not for him). He reassured me that he had been doing this for years and had done the haircut thousands of times. He made sure to stop and ask me if I didn’t like something before he kept going. He even went as far as to take pictures of the back of my head to show me how it was looking so far and if I wanted to change anything. I felt very comfortable and the conversation we had was very nice. The man at the front desk (whose name I unfortunately did not catch) was very friendly and greeted me the second I walked in the door and helped me immediately. He also joined into our conversation at some points and was very fun to talk to. One of the best haircut experiences I ever had and it wasn’t even at a high end salon. I would give this place more stars if I could.
[8] Good haircuts and can't beat the price (especially when they send the 7.99 coupon!
[9] The beat Great Clips I have ever been to. The staff is very nice and skillful.
[10] The truth about this place the owners of this franchise are good cristian family unfortunately the manager has no experience dealings with either the worker's or the customers and it's so unfortunate because this Salon has some really really good-hearted people clientele that would regularly come in I really Miss doing my job and Hope that the owners have lots of success and to Miss J God bless you

Experiences with specific stylists at this Great Clips location vary. Mona has received mixed reviews; one customer reported that Mona ignored specific requests not to use a razor and proceeded to do whatever she wanted, leading to dissatisfaction [1], while another customer found Mona to be super fun, providing an excellent hairstyle with aftercare instructions [3]. Real Customer Reviews (Total: 10):
[1] The team was attentive, clearly communicated and efficient. I was in and out quickly as well.
[2] This fantastic team of workers performed like a high level pit crew at a Nascar race while they changed my oil, ran diagnostics on many of my car's systems, parts, etc., patiently answered my questions, and did so much more (customers gets an extensive, detailed readout/list of their work, checks, etc.) - all the while performing their duties very, very efficiently, professionally, warmly, and knowledgeably.Kudos to Jiffy Lube for rehabilitating their reputation and offering this wonderful service to our town; we are very lucky to have this wonderful alternative to local mechanics' shops, which, unfortunately, in my experience this past year, have often resisted mask-wearing despite the obvious and sometimes vocal discomfort of their customers.Added bonus in the time of Covid:  customers sit comfortably in their own cars the whole time, after they simply drive up to the line without an appointment.
[3] Thank you to TIM NEUMAN!! We will see you soon at jiffy!My family is extremely picky about the people we trust with our vehicles and we've had a lot of bad experiences at jiffy lube and we got into a situation where we needed another person to check a vehicle for us and do a few major things on it. We weren't entirely sure what to expect because we've had bad experiences at jiffy lube in arroyo grande before but we came across a gentleman named TIM NEUMAN and he is honestly the best person we've ever come across to help with our vehicles. He not only made us feel comfortable but he also treated us as if the vehicle was his own. he gave us honest and true opinions about what was and wasn't wrong with a vehicle and he didn't try to haggle us to pay more things and purchase things we didn't need to we felt like he truly cared about the condition of our vehicle and he's officially made friends with us for life! Thank you so much! We will be forever coming to jiffy lube as long as TIM is there to help us!
[4] Everyone I talked to was knowledgeable and friendly. I have no complaints, I left with my day brightened by their interactions even though I had one of those days where you go in for one thing and it turns out your car is falling apart at the seams and you have to fix it all. Haha. Overall very good experience.
[5] They did a brake job for my Honda. Fast service, and very good work. Thanks guys!
[6] While the service at that moment in time was great, the overall experience was not.I came in for a basic oil change and left being told there was an additional issue. Came back a few days later to get that issue fixed and paid several hundred dollars. At the end of that issue being fixed, I was coincidently told that there was another issue they just found out about that was on the same side of the car where the repair was being done and that that would cost me almost $500 more dollars to fix.I took my car to get a second opinion and surely enough, the issue this jiffy lube wanted to charge me almost $500 for, was not an issue at all! And In fact the new noise I was hearing Only after the repair was due to some maneuvering Of parts that was done during the repair.While I am thankful for the service I received, I will not be going back to jiffy lube. I understand that mistakes are made and time are tough right now. But as a business, taking advantage of a customer just to make more money is NOT the way and completely unacceptable. Honesty and integrity go a long way. I don’t usually write out reviews but I am not happy about this and if I can save someone the headache and money to not go through this situation or something similar I will.
[7] Best experience I’ve ever had with anything car related, despite it being done quickly and for a good industry standard price, the team at this jiffy is professional and extremely efficient. Gene and the team were really on every aspect of the oil change, pressure check, etc.. would highly recommend this jiffy
[8] They were very helpful and professional and thorough I was very pleased
[9] Very professional and friendly crew,  answered all my questions, and did an excellent job!
[10] The staff were very friendly, quick and efficient. They started servicing my vehicle as soon as I pulled up to the back of their shop.

Jiffy Lube offers oil changes, as indicated by customers who came in for this service [1][2][6]. Additionally, they provide brake jobs [5], run diagnostics on car systems and parts [2], and perform pressure checks [7]. Customers highly rate the professionalism and efficiency of the staff, describing them as attentive, efficient, and quick [1][2][10], with some noting they are professional, warm, and knowledgeable [2][7][8][9]. However, one review mentioned an issue with honesty regarding additional repairs [6].

[5] Love this place...professional, relaxing atmosphere.  They dont take customers for granted, they ensure im happy after each service. ❤
[6] So I got my first lash extensions 2 wks ago, the girl did a great job for being young and starting out, however she didn't ask me if I was allergic to Latex and didn't offer different types of eyelashes, I got 13's and hybrid. I spent a week in agony out of state. And they started falling off the next day. I was out of state and the day after I got back I called in they fit me in asap. Angels from heaven.. Nic removed the old (not going to lie, the solution stung badly) and Ryan applied my new one Classic 10,11, and 12's. They were both so nice, patient and very thorough. I bought some after care, wash, Naturelash, because after chemo 3 years ago my lashes have never grown right. I also bought the monthly membership. Its been a week and I finally had 1 extension fall off. My next appt is in 1 week and I am so thankful for this place, No makeup or mascara needed for this gym rat, college student anymore. The customer service is Amazing too! If you are unsure or nervous, or think it's a little more expensive, which it isn't, for the quality they offer. Book your appointment today!
[7] This place is clean and has a great atmosphere. Upon entry I was greeted by Diana, the manager. She gave me a new client general questionnaire, and instructed me towards the back sink to clean my lashes prior to extensions.My lash artist, Angie, did a great job in application.She was in training, but did my lashes like a pro. They ended up looking like hundred dollar quality lashes. Overall, I love them and are worth way more than what I paid for.This was definitely a 5 star experience. Thank you Amazing Lash Studio.
[8] So here I am at my 1st appointment and this Julie girl decides she does not feel like working today. They first told me to wait to see if she feels better but that my appointment was valid. Then they rescheduled me for 30 min earlier. So I accepted...then they cancel on me last minute. Very rude front staff and receptionist. This place wants to charge a $40 dollar fee if the client cancels  but only is willing to give $20 off for  missed appointment when the client is already at the location and took time out of their day to make the scheduled appointment. I could have taken my kids out or gone somewhere else but no they don't care at all. Must be nice to have to much business they ain't hungry! This place may do a great job wouldn't know never got any services done. But I wouldn't trust them..staff seems like they don't care about me now when I haven't given them money so after they get your money I'm sure they really don't care if your satisfied or not. I just feel like they should match the cancelation fee and I should get $40 off it's only fair.  Very bad service be careful doing business with this establishment.
[9] Fantastic experience with Angie! She was very accommodating to my skin reaction to tape/anything being applied to my face during the process other than the under eye gel patches. Great service and friendly Valencia team.
[10] All of the girls here are amazing! I can make an appointment and not worry about who I get. I always love my lashes and I get tons of compliments.

address: Players Lounge, 758 Beaumont Ave, Beaumont, CA 92223

messages.content: You are a professional local business analyst. Please objectively and accurately answer user questions about a specific business based on the provided context. Be honest if you don't know.

Business Name: Players Lounge
Category: Cocktail bar

Real Customer Reviews (Total: 10):
[1] You might come in a stranger but if your open to it you'll leave with new friends.
[2] Maybe it was just a bad day, been there once before and it was fine, bartender was friendly, but the last time was a different story. There was a heavy smell of cigarette smoke and the customers were very loud, swearing a lot, obnoxious and really drunk, and that was just the women, couldn't wait to get out. But the bartender was polite and friendly, good prices. Wish we could go back but there was too much loud vulgarity and drunken behavior, it chases customers away.
[3] I always get great service here and the drinks are amazing! Bartenders are very friendly and there's a good mix of people that come in. They have a pool table and a jukebox. Plus you can order pizza by the slice (among other things) from Grumpy Tom's next door! I definitely recommend stopping by Players for a drink.
[4] Great drinks, good prices, good bartenders (Garrett is great!), good food from Grumpy Tom's!  It's all good!
[5] Love this place. Great drinks, great service and bartenders are awesome. Great customers to hangout and talk with also. Can’t wait to get off work to go relax😀
[6] Love the people!  Reasonably priced and the service is awesome!
[7] It's more like a slice of "Cheer's"  which is calling it comfortable and friendly. Good place to catch a game plenty of screens from most seats.  They don't have a kitchen but will let you eat from pizza place next door while you watch the game so that's a plus due to the quality of that menu. Two for one stop!  Nice sports theme decor and they have a pool table as well! 👍👍
[8] Great small bar that borders dive, but its not. Great drinks. Most times local hangout for regulars. Conservative values without drama.
[9] The staff and general environment was cool. Everyone was polite. However, the patronage is sectoral. Lacks diversity, neighborhood watering hole.Time for an upgrade. Players is  (As discribed) a great neighborhood watering hole. It takes a visit or two for folks to relax with newcomers. However, once done it's a warm friendly spot with good sports little politics, good service and great pricing. It's one of my spots now. After further review. Its apparent that it just takes a couple of visits. To appreciate the warm atmosphere. It's a great place once everyone gets to relax w/each other. Service IS very good. However my review is limited to the day crowd.
[10] Always a good time at The Players Lounge. Greatest part is that the bartender always remembers you. Wish I knew her name. She's awesome!!!

User Question: What are the main features and atmosphere like at Players Lounge based on customer experiences?

Players Lounge is described as a cocktail bar with a friendly and comfortable atmosphere, often compared to a slice of 'Cheers' [7]. Customers report that the bartenders are friendly, polite, and provide great service, with some mentioning specific bartenders like Garrett [1][2][3][4][5][6][10]. The drinks are praised as amazing, great, and reasonably priced [3][4][5][6][8]. The bar offers amenities such as a pool table, a jukebox, and multiple screens for watching sports [3][7]. While there is no kitchen, customers can order food, including pizza by the slice, from Grumpy Tom's next door [3][4][7]. The atmosphere is noted as a local hangout for regulars, with a warm and friendly environment after a few visits, though some reviews mention a lack of diversity and occasional loud or obnoxious behavior from patrons [2][8][9]. The decor has a sports theme, and the bar is described as having conservative values without drama [7][8].

address: Cottage Pool, 3097 Cottage Way, Sacramento, CA 95825

messages.content: You are a professional local business analyst. Please objectively and accurately answer user questions about a specific business based on the provided context. Be honest if you don't know.

Business Name: Cottage Pool
Category: Public swimming pool

Real Customer Reviews (Total: 10):
[1] Great place to come and swim and have a small picnic
[2] The lifeguards are nice and are great at keeping people safe. There are sitting areas but it’s very little and not a great sitting area. There’s a narrow area and a deep area separated by a rope.
[3] Great community pool. It is what you expect without a lot of the "extra" that plagues other community pool. Great life guard staff.
[4] DO NOT COME HERE! The pool is not deep at all, you are not allowed to do backflips off diving board, the slide is very small and if your bathing suit has a metal zipper or if it has a metal button on it you can't go on the slide. The lifeguards are rude. Not to mention that the adult swim is very long, so don't bring your kids here. It costs $4 which is outrageous because there is only one pool with everybody in it. You also have to take a swim test if you are younger then 13 years old and if you do not pass the test, you are stuck in a tiny part of the pool. And also  half the pool you are not allowed in because they leave a ton of space for people on the diving board and people coming off the slide. Overall I do not recommend to come here, especially if you have kids.
[5] Friendly staff. Clean pool and lots of room with shade.
[6] Life guards were extremely rude, there was no communication between them and the customer pays the price. I asked for my money on the way out, after they said that they wouldn't do anything to stop the older boys from jumping on my toddler in the 2 ft section. I will never go here again and I would advise that you avoid it at all costs as well.
[7] Very nice and clean pool, love to walk to it in the summer. Lots of fun there is a diving board, a slide and another section of the pool where you can just relax and enjoy your time there. There is also a snack bar with different food, candy, soda, ice cream. Bathrooms for male and female separate and each have showers.
[8] My son had swimming lessons here through the Fulton El Camino Recreation and Park District program. I was so happy with the progress he made in the first 2 weeks that I signed him up through the whole summer. The classes were always on time and the instructors were friendly. The service was such an amazing value that I was not even upset when we had to miss EVERY class for 2 weeks because of back to school activities.
[9] I've been coming with my kids to this swimming pool on summers for the last 5 yrs, the only thing that made me give a 4 stars instead of 5 is that everyone has to pay the entrance EVEN IF THEY'RE NOT SWIMMING, everytime a parent needs to come and will only supervise their kids or a group of kids need to pay the whole entrance, may not be much ($3 for the 3 hr stay) but still, if our GS troop requires more adults to supervise on water activities not all parents volunteering will be so pleased to pay just to come supervise. Maybe it would be a good idea to do a special price/bracelet for the non-swimmers. Aside from that, the place is great, facilities are always clean, lifeguards are always active and doing their job, bathrooms are clean, lots of space to set your picnic, you can bring food, parking lot in front is small but its ok, we always enjoy our time here.
[10] We have lived in the area 45 years and our children and their children have always enjoyed Cottage Pool and Park!!

User Question: What are the main complaints customers have about the lifeguards at Cottage Pool?

Some customers have reported that the lifeguards are rude [4][6]. For example, one review mentioned that lifeguards were extremely rude and there was no communication between them and customers, leading to a negative experience [6]. Another review stated that the lifeguards are rude as part of a broader complaint about the pool [4]. However, other reviews highlight that the lifeguards are nice and great at keeping people safe [2], and that the lifeguard staff is great [3]. Additionally, one review noted that lifeguards are always active and doing their job [9].
